盘龙::character::char_1.name: 林雷
盘龙::character::char_1.description: a young boy around six years old with short black hair, round face, lean child frame, wearing simple cloth clothes and leather boots

盘龙::character::char_2.name: 哈德利
盘龙::character::char_2.description: young blond boy around six years old, large curious eyes, small frame, wearing simple cloth training clothes

盘龙::location::loc_1.name: 乌山镇训练场
盘龙::location::loc_1.description: open outdoor training ground surrounded by wooden fences and distant mountains, early morning light casting soft golden hues, rows of children standing in formation on grassy earth

盘龙::character::char_3.name: 希尔曼
盘龙::character::char_3.description: middle-aged man with broad shoulders and defined muscles, short black hair with streaks of gray, stern eyes, numerous scars on his bare torso from blades and swords

盘龙::character::char_4.name: 罗瑞
盘龙::character::char_4.description: young adult male instructor, athletic build, short brown hair, wearing simple trainer's clothes, friendly expression

盘龙::character::char_5.name: 罗杰
盘龙::character::char_5.description: young adult male instructor, fit build, serious expression, wearing trainer's clothes, observing children

盘龙::character::char_6.name: 希尔曼、罗瑞、罗杰
盘龙::character::char_6.description: 希尔曼、罗瑞、罗杰，本集配角
